title: DTQEM v16.0 – Synchronized Two‑Times Model (Effective Lindblad Framework)
description: DTQEM v16.0 presents a stable 2×2 effective Lindblad model for quantum tunneling under continuous measurement. The observer strength E_ext controls the effective Rabi frequency (ω = ω₀(1−E)) and adds pure dephasing (σ_z Lindblad operator). Numerical simulations reproduce the quantum Zeno freeze (P=0 at E=1), a synchronisation peak at E=0.5, and the quadratic scaling P ∝ (1−E)². The framework unifies wave‑particle duality, Zeno effect, and quantum eraser under the concept of temporal balance (observer time + particle time = 1).
